flags.summary: In-state tuition at Warner Pacific University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.9k → $22.2k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Warner Pacific University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.9k → $22.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Warner Pacific University rose 46% between 2021 and 2024 (33.8% → 49.2%).
